_about: Data-driven price table for the cost-ledger (COORD-026, TOKEN_ECONOMICS.md lever #1). Prices are USD per 1,000,000 tokens, split into input and output. `gov record-cost` uses this table to estimate USD when --usd is omitted. NEVER hardcode prices in governance.js; edit them here. Model keys are matched case-insensitively; an exact key match wins, otherwise the longest matching key prefix wins, otherwise the `default` fallback is used. The `default` entry is intentionally conservative so an unknown model is never silently costed at zero. Numbers below are illustrative placeholders for the adopter's own model classes — replace with the rates negotiated with your provider.

default._note: Unknown-model fallback: priced at the highest known class so unrecognized models are never undercounted. Override per model under `models`.
